concepts.name: BT Living Ligature
concepts.idea: A bold BT monogram makes the product name immediate, while one living node gives the initials a warm point of connection.
concepts.motionLabel: B draws, T joins, living node wakes
concepts.bestFor: Strongest app icon, favicon, and social-avatar route.
concepts.watchout: The letters must keep reading BT immediately when the mark is redrawn as a production vector.
concepts.nextStep: Redraw the selected ligature on a strict grid and tune its counters at 16 px.

concepts.name: Rooted BT
concepts.idea: The initials become the living structure: a clear coral B, a grounded forest T, and a compact bonsai crown growing from the letterform.
concepts.motionLabel: BT rises, leaves open, crown settles
concepts.bestFor: Best balance of recognizable initials and the existing garden story.
concepts.watchout: Keep the leaves structural and restrained so the mark never looks like letters with decoration pasted on.
concepts.nextStep: Separate the B, T, and leaf tips into reusable animation layers.

concepts.name: Heartwood Bonsai
concepts.approvalNote: Heart-shaped seed drops, takes root, and draws the paired trees together into one shared heart.
concepts.idea: A saffron heart-shaped seed takes root between two independent trunks, which grow together to reveal one shared heart and canopy.
concepts.motionLabel: Heart seed drops, trees grow together, shared heart blooms
concepts.bestFor: The approved emotional mark: relationship, growth, and two equal partners resolve in one compact icon.
concepts.watchout: Keep the seed clearly heart-shaped at 20 px while preserving the larger heart as negative space rather than adding a second symbol.
concepts.nextStep: Redraw the seed, trunks, heart opening, and canopy as four production vector layers using this approved motion sequence.

concepts.name: Open Heart Pair
concepts.idea: Two independent relationship strokes form one recognizable heart without closing or losing their individuality.
concepts.motionLabel: Halves approach, heart holds, seed pulses
concepts.bestFor: Most universal and emotionally immediate social-sharing mark.
concepts.watchout: Keep the open terminals and asymmetry distinctive enough to avoid generic dating-app territory.
concepts.nextStep: Refine the open terminals as exact motion endpoints and run a formal trademark screen.

concepts.name: BT Editorial Signature
concepts.idea: A restrained BT signature gives the complete Better Together name a mature identity that can scale across app, editorial, and merchandise use.
concepts.motionLabel: Serifs draw, bridge lands, signature settles
concepts.bestFor: Strongest website, editorial, merchandise, and premium identity route.
concepts.watchout: The final typography must be custom-drawn and warm rather than reading as stock serif lettering.
concepts.nextStep: Draw a complete production wordmark family around the selected BT signature.

concepts.name: BT Sprout Cut
concepts.idea: A more organic BT alternative cuts the initials from two broad growing forms and turns their shared junction into a single sprout.
concepts.motionLabel: Cuts open, letters resolve, sprout lifts
concepts.bestFor: A softer, more handcrafted BT app-icon option.
concepts.watchout: The cut geometry still has to read BT before it reads botanical.
concepts.nextStep: Balance the negative-space counters and define the sprout as two animation layers.

concepts.name: Canopy BT
concepts.idea: Instead of growing leaves from one letter, this version lets the B and T hold a shared three-part bonsai canopy above them.
concepts.motionLabel: Letters ground, canopy gathers, seed settles
concepts.bestFor: A compact initials-first bonsai with a darker shelf presence.
concepts.watchout: The canopy must stay graphic and separate from the letter counters.
concepts.nextStep: Refine the three canopy masses so they remain distinct at 20 px.

concepts.name: Heartwood Minimal
concepts.idea: A reduced heart-bonsai keeps two trunks, one heart-shaped opening, and a sparse leaf crown for a cleaner small-size mark.
concepts.motionLabel: Trunks rise, heart clears, leaves open
concepts.bestFor: The clearest small-size bonsai and heart combination.
concepts.watchout: Keep the base open so the paired trunks never become one generic tree trunk.
concepts.nextStep: Tune the heart opening as a single-color cutout and test monochrome silhouettes.

concepts.name: Offset Heart
concepts.idea: Two offset heart halves hold their individuality while one small diamond marks the intentional space they share.
concepts.motionLabel: Halves align, diamond turns, heart settles
concepts.bestFor: A more graphic and contemporary relationship-first mark.
concepts.watchout: The offset should feel intentional while the full silhouette still reads as a heart instantly.
concepts.nextStep: Tune the diagonal gap and diamond scale at notification-icon size.

concepts.name: BT Garden Serif
concepts.idea: A warmer serif BT turns the T crossbar into one controlled leaf terminal, tying the editorial system back to growth.
concepts.motionLabel: Serifs draw, leaf turns, period lands
concepts.bestFor: A warmer editorial identity with more visible garden character.
concepts.watchout: The leaf terminal must stay subtle enough that the T remains unmistakable.
concepts.nextStep: Draw the complete wordmark alphabet and standardize the leaf terminal.

concepts.name: Open Heart Seed
concepts.idea: The two independent heart strokes now protect a recognizable seed, turning connection into something both people intentionally nurture.
concepts.motionLabel: Halves approach, seed wakes, heart holds
concepts.bestFor: A relationship-first app icon with a clearer link to Better Together's growth and garden story.
concepts.watchout: Keep the seed compact and unmistakable at small sizes so it never reads as a flame or generic center dot.
concepts.nextStep: Compare this seed-centered route with concept 04, then refine the approved silhouette as a production vector and motion asset.

concepts.name: BT Cornerstone
concepts.idea: A compact editorial BT sits on one shared baseline, using a single corner block to symbolize commitment without becoming a badge.
concepts.motionLabel: Letters draw, baseline settles, stone locks
concepts.bestFor: A mature editorial identity that can lead with the full brand name.
concepts.watchout: The shared baseline must stay light enough to avoid a construction-company feel.
concepts.nextStep: Draw a complete custom wordmark alphabet from the icon's serif proportions.

concepts.name: Heart Aperture
concepts.idea: Two protective arcs create a heart only in the space between them, turning connection into an opening rather than a filled symbol.
concepts.motionLabel: Arcs rotate, heart opens, seed rises
concepts.bestFor: A contemporary relationship symbol that avoids a conventional filled heart.
concepts.watchout: The negative-space heart must remain obvious at notification size.
concepts.nextStep: Tune the arc curvature against 20 px and one-color silhouette tests.

concepts.name: Twin Petal Heart
concepts.idea: Two oversized petals lean together to create a heart silhouette, joining the emotional and garden territories with only three shapes.
concepts.motionLabel: Petals rise, lean inward, seed settles
concepts.bestFor: A soft garden-heart icon with exceptionally simple production geometry.
concepts.watchout: The petals need to read as a heart before they read as a floral logo.
concepts.nextStep: Refine the shared outer silhouette and test the petals as separate motion layers.

concepts.name: Bonsai Duet
concepts.idea: Two trunks remain visibly independent while supporting one sparse shared canopy, giving the bonsai a more equal partnership structure.
concepts.motionLabel: Trunks rise, branches cross, canopy opens
concepts.bestFor: A warm bonsai direction that makes partnership visible without relying on initials.
concepts.watchout: The crossing branches must feel cooperative rather than tangled.
concepts.nextStep: Reduce the crossing junction to two clean vector overlaps and build a four-beat growth loop.

concepts.name: Modern Garden Seal
concepts.idea: The approved Garden Seal seed is reduced to an open arc, two living stems, and one sun, preserving the emblem without scenic detail.
concepts.motionLabel: Arc draws, stems meet, sun lifts
concepts.bestFor: The closest modern production evolution of the Garden Seal direction Julian already liked.
concepts.watchout: The open arc must frame the growth without becoming a generic sustainability badge.
concepts.nextStep: Vectorize the arc and stems as three independent Icon Composer layers.

concepts.name: Canopy Window
concepts.idea: Two trunks create a calm open window beneath one canopy, emphasizing the shared space a relationship protects.
concepts.motionLabel: Trunks lift, window opens, canopy settles
concepts.bestFor: A friendly bonsai symbol with a clear protected-space metaphor.
concepts.watchout: The opening should stay organic and never become a house or doorway icon.
concepts.nextStep: Tune the arch and canopy masses for a clean monochrome silhouette.
